hero.name: workbranch
hero.subtitle: Create isolated task folders, keep base branches fresh, and move branch work from start to finish with commands you can remember.

install.title: Install
install.subtitle: Choose Homebrew for released builds, or run the install script directly.
install.script_note: Installs from the public repository script
install.curl_note: Installs from the public repository script

features.title: What workbranch does
features.subtitle: Four small workflows for task workspaces, branch sync, combined flows, and local tools.

groups.title: Workspace lifecycle

commands.desc: Create or clone the shared base worktrees from project config.
Create one task folder with linked worktrees for every configured repo.
Remove a task workspace, its worktrees, and local task branches.

groups.note: Each task becomes a small mono-repo workspace, so an AI agent can use frontend and backend in the same session.

groups.title: Branch workflow
groups.description: Pull fresh base branches, update task branches, push work, and land finished changes without memorizing worktree plumbing.

commands.desc: Push base branches or a specific task branch to origin.
Pull remote base branches into the local _base repos.
Merge local base changes into one task workspace or every task workspace.
Fast-forward finished task work back into local base branches.

groups.title: Combined flow
groups.description: Run the common multi-step flows — refresh, finalize, prune — with one command.

commands.desc: Pull base branches, then update every task workspace.
Pull base branches, then update one task workspace.
Pull base branches, update one task, then land it into local base branches.
Remove clean task workspaces already merged into local base branches.

groups.title: Tool commands
groups.description: Open the whole task workspace in your editor or terminal without finding each repo by hand.

commands.desc: Open the task repo worktrees in the configured IDE.
Open the task repo worktrees in the configured terminal.

workflow.title: Two workflows, that's it
workflow.subtitle: A small, predictable command set covers the whole task lifecycle.

lifecycle.desc: Create or clone the shared base worktrees from project config.
Create one task folder with linked worktrees for every configured repo.
Remove a task workspace, its worktrees, and local task branches.

workflow.branch_subtitle: Update, push, and inspect task branches.

branch.desc: Push base branches or a specific task branch to origin.
Pull remote base branches into the local _base repos.
Merge local base changes into task workspaces.
Fast-forward finished task work back into local base branches.

cta.title: Stop fighting git worktree
cta.description: Spin up clean, isolated task spaces and keep your branches in sync with a handful of commands.

structure.title: How workbranch organizes your repos
structure.subtitle: Keep shared base worktrees in _base/, then create one folder per task with linked worktrees for each repo.
structure.base_desc: Shared base checkout for each repo, usually tracking main.
structure.task_desc: Per-task linked checkout for each repo and task branch.

products.title: Useful tools
products.subtitle: Small apps and open-source tools I maintain.

workbranch.title: workbranch
workbranch.description: A small CLI for creating task-based Git worktree spaces across one repo or many repos.
